name: w16-query-knowledge-base
description: Search the Apex Auto Insurance knowledge base to answer customer questions about coverage types, policy exclusions, claims process, premiums, discounts, and Ohio state requirements. Use this tool when a customer asks any general insurance question that is not a specific policy lookup, claim filing, or quote request.

question.description: The customer's insurance question in plain language, e.g. 'Does my policy cover rental cars?' or 'What is comprehensive coverage?'

num_results.description: Number of knowledge base chunks to retrieve (optional, default 5, max 10)
